title: One Year In
scenario: It's the final month of your first salaried year. You've learned a lot. With a little surplus in hand, how do you close the year?

choices.label: Splurge to celebrate the year
choices.lesson: Celebrating is fine, but ending the year by raising your lifestyle baseline makes next year's saving harder before it even starts.

choices.label: Boost your monthly SIP
choices.lesson: Consistency wins. Stepping up investments as income grows — instead of spending the raise — is what compounds into financial freedom.
